criteria_results.description: Minimize toolbar for mobile: hide Projects navigation, ToolSelector, ObjectPropertyEditor, and Saving/Saved status; keep only Save, Export ZIP, and Export PDF.
criteria_results.evidence: Toolbar.tsx (lines 25, 41, 54, 88) hides non-essential elements on mobile. ProjectActions.tsx (lines 48-78) returns only Save, Download (PDF), and Archive (ZIP) buttons when isMobile is true.

criteria_results.description: Automatic save after every photo upload.
criteria_results.evidence: handleSave(true) is called after ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO dispatch in MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 75) and ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx (line 103).
handleSave(true) is called after REMOVE_OBJECT_PHOTO dispatch in ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx (line 144).

criteria_results.description: Allow changing object status for PM role from mobile quick-access bar.
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 173-214) renders status change buttons for PMs with UPDATE_OBJECTS and handleSave(true) logic.

criteria_results.description: Enlarge mobile quick-access bar and status buttons for usability.
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx increases row height to h-20 (line 112) and status buttons to h-12 (line 188). PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx uses h-11 for status buttons (line 86).

criteria_results.description: Adjust home page layout to prevent overlap with enlarged mobile bottom bar.
criteria_results.evidence: home.tsx (line 40) increases bottom padding to pb-40 when an object is selected on mobile.

suggestions: Consider debouncing handleSave if photo uploads are very frequent, although silent saving (handleSave(true)) is generally lightweight.

commit_message.subject: Minimize mobile toolbar and enhance PM quick-access
commit_message.body:
This commit focuses on optimizing the mobile experience for PMs and ensuring data integrity through auto-saves. Key changes include:

- Minimized top Toolbar on mobile by hiding navigation and status indicators.
- Simplified ProjectActions on mobile to only show Save and Export options with larger touch targets.
- Implemented auto-save (silent) after photo uploads, deletions, and status changes.
- Enlarged the MobileBottomBar for PMs to include a quick-access status change row.
- Increased bottom padding on the Home page to accommodate the larger mobile UI elements.
